# uapi_diagnostics (Data Source)

Runtime diagnostics: loaded resources, uptime, and lock state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_diagnostics" "now" {}

output "uapi_uptime" {
  value = data.uapi_diagnostics.now.uptime_seconds
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `lock_state` (Attributes) Current advisory lock holders. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lock_state))
- `recent_errors` (Attributes List) Best-effort sliding window of recent error responses (newest last). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--recent_errors))
- `request_id` (String) Request id assigned to this diagnostics call.
- `resources_loaded` (List of String) Curated resource keys the server has loaded.
- `uptime_seconds` (Number) Seconds since the router booted.
- `version` (String) uapi version string.

<a id="nestedatt--lock_state"></a>
### Nested Schema for `lock_state`

Read-Only:

- `global_held` (Boolean) Whether the global uapi lock is held.
- `packages_held` (List of String) Packages whose per-package lock is held.


<a id="nestedatt--recent_errors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `recent_errors`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) Error code.
- `message` (String) Error message.
- `method` (String) HTTP method.
- `path` (String) Request path.
- `request_id` (String) Request id of the failed request.
- `status` (Number) HTTP status.
- `ts` (Number) Unix epoch seconds when the error occurred.
